html:
Bacon and Eggs is a Meat Food item cooked in the Crock Pot by adding 2.0 units of Eggs and 1.25 units of Meats. It takes 40 seconds to cook.

Adding more than 1 Monster Meat may result in Monster Lasagna, unless 1 Twig is also added; in this case, a Tallbird Egg must be added, as one normal Egg does not provide enough Egg value to create Bacon and Eggs. Adding any Vegetable will result in Pierogi.


Prerequisites

  • Requires:
  • Requires:
  • Excludes:

Recipe

x1.25

×2.0

Filler cannot be Vegetables.

Examples

50% chance to produce Monster Lasagna.

Tips

  • Bacon and Eggs replenish as much hunger as Meatballs while healing the same amount as Honey Nuggets. For this reason, it is a good food option when one returns to base after losing health, and requires both nutrition and healing.
  • Bacon and Eggs are an effective recipe if one's base has a Birdcage, as it is a good way to spend an excess supply of Monster Meat: two Monster Meats can be fed to the Bird for Eggs, while the remaining 0.5 meat requirement can be made up with Morsels, which can fulfil the recipe with three uses of Monster Meats (one as itself, two turned into eggs).
  • Bacon and Eggs have an exceptional spoilage time of 20 days, which makes them a good alternative for Jerky while making long expeditions, or if one needs to increase the longevity of their meat stock.
    • Pierogi has an identical spoilage time and can be made with almost the same recipe (substituting an Egg for a Vegetable), though it heals for twice the amount and restores half the hunger of Bacon and Eggs. As such, it is better for expeditions where one will lose more health (such as clearing multiple Spider Dens).

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

–Wendy

–WX-78
“My stomach is aching. Blue eggs and bacon!”
–Wickerbottom
“Awww. It's just front bacon.”
–Woodie
“Now that is a proper breakfast.”
–Maxwell
“Theoretically, my stomach will process this with no ill effects.”
–Wagstaff
“Pig and eggs!”
–Wigfrid
“I'd rather have sugary cereal. Oh well.”
–Webber
“Turn that frown upside down!”
–Walani
“Runny eggs... crisp bacon... I could die happy now...”
–Warly
“Th'most important meal o'th'day!”
–Woodlegs

–Wilba
“Belly filler”
–Wormwood
“Not often I get a breakfast like this.”
–Wheeler
“A hearty breakfast for a full day's work.”
–Winona
“A mortal favorite.”
–Wortox
“Blegh!!”
–Wurt
“A good camping breakfast.”
–Walter
“Who has time to sit and eat breakfast?”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thịt Xông Khói Và Trứng là một Thực Phẩm Thịt được nấu trong Nồi Hầm bằng cách thêm 2,0 đơn vị Trứng và 1,25 đơn vị Thịt. Phải mất 40 giây để nấu ăn.

'''Bacon and Eggs''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[Food]] [[item]] cooked in the [[Crock Pot]] by adding 2.0 units of [[Eggs]] and 1.25 units of Meats. It takes 40 seconds to cook.

Adding more than 1 [[Monster Meat]] may result in [[Monster Lasagna]], unless 1 [[Twigs|Twig]] is also added; in this case, a [[Tallbird Egg]] must be added, as one normal [[Egg]] does not provide enough Egg value to create Bacon and Eggs. Adding any [[Vegetables|Vegetable]] will result in [[Pierogi]].

__NOTOC__
==Prerequisites==
* Requires: [[File:Meats Crock Pot.png|link=Meats]]
*Requires: [[File:Eggs Crock Pot.png|link=Eggs]]
*Excludes: [[File:Vegetables Crock Pot.png|link=Vegetables]]

=={{pic|32|TabScience}} Recipe==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Meats
|count1 = 1.25
|item2 = Eggs
|count2 = 2.0
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Bacon and Eggs
|note = Filler cannot be [[Vegetables]].
|comparator1=x|comparator2=×}}
==Examples==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Meat
|item2 = Morsel
|item3 = Egg
|item4 = Egg
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Bacon and Eggs
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Meat
|item2 = Monster Meat
|item3 = Tallbird Egg
|item4 = Twigs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Bacon and Eggs
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Meats
|item2 = Monster Meats
|item3 = Small Eggs
|item4 = Small Eggs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Bacon and Eggs
|note = 50% chance to produce [[Monster Lasagna]].
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Normal Meats
|item2 = Morsels
|item3 = Tallbird Eggs
|item4 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Bacon and Eggs
|dlc = Reign of Giants
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Meats
|item2 = Raw Fishes
|item3 = Doydoy Egg
|item4 = Egg
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Bacon and Eggs
|dlc = Shipwrecked
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Meats
|item2 = Dead Dogfish
|item3 = Small Eggs
|item4 = Small Eggs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Bacon and Eggs
|dlc = shipwrecked
}}

== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Bacon and Eggs replenish as much hunger as [[Meatballs]] while healing the same amount as [[Honey Nuggets]]. For this reason, it is a good food option when one returns to base after losing health, and requires both nutrition and healing.
* Bacon and Eggs are an effective recipe if one's base has a [[Birdcage]], as it is a good way to spend an excess supply of [[Monster Meat]]: two Monster Meats can be fed to the Bird for Eggs, while the remaining 0.5 meat requirement can be made up with [[Morsel|Morsels]], which can fulfil the recipe with three uses of Monster Meats (one as itself, two turned into eggs).
* Bacon and Eggs have an exceptional spoilage time of 20 days, which makes them a good alternative for [[Jerky]] while making long expeditions, or if one needs to increase the longevity of their meat stock. 
** [[Pierogi]] has an identical spoilage time and can be made with almost the same recipe (substituting an Egg for a Vegetable), though it heals for twice the amount and restores half the hunger of Bacon and Eggs. As such, it is better for expeditions where one will lose more health (such as clearing multiple [[Spider Den|Spider Dens]]).
